# ceph_s3_bucket_acl (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bucket` (String)

### Optional

- `grant` (Block Set) ACL grant entries (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--grant))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `owner` (Block, Read-only) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--owner))

<a id="nestedblock--grant"></a>
### Nested Schema for `grant`

Required:

- `permission` (String) Permission: FULL_CONTROL, READ, WRITE, READ_ACP, WRITE_ACP
- `type` (String) Grantee type: CanonicalUser or Group

Optional:

- `id` (String) Canonical user ID (UID). Required when type=CanonicalUser.
- `uri` (String) Group URI. Required when type=Group.


<a id="nestedblock--owner"></a>
### Nested Schema for `owner`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String)
- `id` (String)
